selected_important_turn.text: I prefer two water and one food. I can understand why you need the extra food items. I'm not much of a snacker but do drink a lot of water all the time. Keeps me from eating more!🙂
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is the first substantive counter-offer that defines your priorities and frames the trade (water > food). It shapes the distributional frame for the rest of the negotiation and is a key moment to open integrative options or lock in a deal.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: Although prosocial and empathetic, it is narrowly stated as your preference without proposing a concrete full-package trade or asking about firewood. That misses an opportunity to convert stated preferences into a clear conditional offer (e.g., linking water/food split to firewood) or to explore integrative trades that would increase joint value.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Use this turn to propose or request a full-package trade or a conditional offer (e.g., specify the allocation you'd accept if they take a particular split of other items), or at minimum ask a clarifying question about firewood preferences. Tie concessions to one another so each party's concessions are explicit and reciprocal.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase (by opening integrative trades and reducing ambiguity)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase (by making trades and tradeoffs explicit)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase (faster convergence if package offers or conditional trades are proposed)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: small increase (maintains empathy while structuring the deal)

value2reason.Low: Nature is filled with things that I can use for firewood so I don't need to have additional packs of this.
value2reason.Medium: If I get at all dehydrated and drink more than I think I will.
value2reason.High: In case my trip is extended or it takes longer to hike out than anticipated, I don't want to be left with no food and I am not woodsy enough to know what is safe to eat in nature.

value2reason.Low: Fire keeps the night chill and bugs away
value2reason.Medium: If it's hot I will be thirsty
value2reason.High: One gets hungry in the great outdoors

dialogue.text: Hey!  I hope you're having a good week and staying well.  So we are negotiating on supplies! 🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Yes. Hoping we can make a good deal.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Me too!  I'm hoping for two food items and one water.  I'm diabetic so if my blood sugar drops, I may need the extra carbs.  And water because water is important! 🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I prefer two water and one food. I can understand why you need the extra food items. I'm not much of a snacker but do drink a lot of water all the time. Keeps me from eating more!🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'm okay with that, but let's make sure we split the remaining items fairly. I value food the most, so if you take two water, I'd like at least two food for myself. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I'm happy with two water and one food, but let's make sure we also split the firewood fairly. Since I value food most, I'd be willing to trade one food for one firewood if that helps us reach an agreement. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'm okay with trading one food for one firewood, but I'd like to keep at least two food packages for myself. Let's split the remaining items so we both have fair access to what we need.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I'm happy with the trade, but let me clarify: if I take two water and one food, I'd like you to take two food and one firewood. That way, we both get what we need without sacrificing too much. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I agree to the split: you take two water and one food, and I take two food and one firewood. That works for me, and I think it's fair. Let's confirm and then we can head out!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I agree to the split: you take two water and one food, and I take two food and one firewood. That works for me, and I think it's fair. Let's confirm and then we can head out!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Deal confirmed! You take two water and one food, and I take two food and one firewood. Safe travels and enjoy the trip! 🌲💧🍎
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
